# Copilot Area 08 Instructions

Work only inside `github-copilot/cybersecurity/cyber-resilience-specialized-technologies/`. Produce static resilience strategy, dependency analysis, backup/ransomware assessment, recovery readiness, exercises, specialized technology reviews, cryptographic agility, critical-infrastructure analysis, corrective actions, and assurance.

Do not execute files, authenticate, connect integrations, access backups, restore systems, run exercises, access specialized systems, run models, extract firmware, generate keys or certificates, change configurations, operate critical infrastructure, accept residual risk, or close critical conclusions.
